history.text: I have burnt my house down. Now I will burn the house of anyone who wants to follow me.
history.author: Kabir Das

history.text: I'm learning that love is a kind of attention that doesn't require a performance
history.author: Saeed Jones

history.text: Your body is keeping a tally of every time you chose to be available instead of rested.
history.author: Original

history.text: Nani said to ignore the poetry and watch if he stays to help wash the heavy kadhais after the guests have gone home.
history.author: Original

history.text: The to-do list stays at the desk. It is not allowed to sleep in your bed with you tonight.
history.author: Original

history.text: You’re so busy trying to be worthy of their struggle, you haven't noticed they’re just waiting for you to come home and
history.author: Original

history.text: That tight voice you use when you’re exactly one sentence away from crying on the phone.
history.author: Original

history.text: I’m very interested in the feeling of being bad at something and keeping going anyway
history.author: Greta Gerwig

history.text: A money plant doesn’t argue with the balcony grill. It just finds the gap and keeps climbing toward the light.
history.author: Original

history.text: I am finally okay with being the one who left, even if your mother still asks about me at every wedding.
history.author: Original

history.text: It’s a specific kind of lonely when the person you want to vent to is the problem.
history.author: Original

history.text: You are trying to solve a Tuesday that hasn’t even happened yet.
history.author: Original

history.text: You don’t owe your productivity a refund for the rest you already took.
history.author: Original

history.text: I think perfection is ugly. Somewhere in the things humans make, I want to see scars, failure, disorder, distortion
history.author: Yohji Yamamoto

history.text: The pressure to 'become someone' stops at the door. Inside, you’re just a person putting the cooker on.
history.author: Original

history.text: You still answer the phone with your successful voice when your mother calls, then sit back down in a room that knows yo
history.author: Original
